task: Implement CodeRabbit Coding Plan for issue #2191: Keyboard shortcut hints in presentation editor toolbar
result: Successfully implemented keyboard shortcut hints in toolbar tooltips. Created usePlatform hook with Mac detection and formatShortcut function. Added tooltips to Bold (Ctrl+B/⌘B), Italic (Ctrl+I/⌘I), Underline (Ctrl+U/⌘U), Bullet List (Ctrl+Shift+8/⌘⇧8), Ordered List (Ctrl+Shift+7/⌘⇧7), Regenerate Slide, and Delete Slide buttons. Pushed to sophie/keyboard-shortcut-hints branch.
